top3.sql:
SELECT 
    s_store_name,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales,
    SUM(sr_return_amt) AS total_returns
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    LEFT JOIN store_returns ON store_sales.ss_ticket_number = store_returns.sr_ticket_number
        AND store_sales.ss_store_sk = store_returns.sr_store_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_year = 2000
    AND store.s_state = 'TN'
GROUP BY 
    s_s...

SELECT 
    s_store_name,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales,
    SUM(sr_return_amt) AS total_returns
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
    JOIN store_returns ON ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number AND ss_store_sk = sr_store_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    s_state = 'TN'
    AND d_year = 2000
GROUP BY 
    s_store_name
ORDER BY 
    s_store_name
LIMIT 100;

    AND store.s_state = 'TN'

SELECT 
    s_store_name,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales,
    COALESCE(SUM(sr_return_amt), 0) AS total_returns
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    LEFT JOIN store_returns ON store_sales.ss_ticket_number = store_returns.sr_ticket_number
        AND store_sales.ss_store_sk = store_returns.sr_store_sk
        AND store_returns.sr_returned_date_sk = store_sales.ss_sold...

SELECT 
    s_store_name,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales,
    SUM(sr_return_amt) AS total_returns
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    LEFT JOIN store_returns ON store_sales.ss_ticket_number = store_returns.sr_ticket_number
        AND store_sales.ss_store_sk = store_returns.sr_store_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_year = 2000
    AND store.s_state = 'TN'
GROUP BY 
    s_s...

SELECT 
    s_state,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales,
    SUM(sr_return_amt) AS total_returns
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN store_returns ON ss_store_sk = sr_store_sk AND ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number
    JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d_year = 2000
    AND s_state IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    s_state
ORDER BY 
    s_state;

SELECT 
    s_store_name,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales,
    SUM(sr_return_amt) AS total_returns
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
    JOIN store_returns ON ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number AND ss_store_sk = sr_store_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    s_state = 'TN'
    AND d_year = 2000
GROUP BY 
    s_store_name
ORDER BY 
    s_store_name
LIMIT 100;
